title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Unlockable perks (items, cosmetics, a
content:
✔ Unlockable perks (items, cosmetics, abilities).
✔ Status effects if they miss or fail certain challenges.

📊 Master Sheet (Live Tracker)

✔ Keeps track of:
• XP levels and rank-ups.
• Who has unlocked limited-perk availability.
• Who has active status effects and what antidotes they need.
• Remaining open perks & their availability.

✅ Why This Works:
• Prevents chaos by making everything visible to students.
• Encourages engagement with RPG elements by keeping a tangible scoreboard.
• Adds another layer of accountability to participation and assignments.

💀 2. Status Effects & Antidotes

📜 If a student fails a mastery exam, misses an assignment, or breaks path-specific rules, they get a status effect.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 60 (chunk 60/555)
